textByHash.2003c05d180823fb349e4d39afd4eca7eaf51a5e: I nearly got caught in a rockfall earlier!
textByHash.27dacfc504ae23d0a13231c51fc166dc73208084: Still, since humans started coming down here, the proportion of miners killed in rockfalls has fallen dramatically!
textByHash.27faa1f2976d21ed390368e8c173125416ea833f: We're a bit behind schedule. If you lent us a hand, Mistag would pay you for your work.
textByHash.59ddab33942c080506c40c4ac665546748f31dbf: It's going well. I find repeatedly hitting a piece of rock very therapeutic.
textByHash.9fb4a52754b37e959d3ea52c11268306f06f5c50: Well, our legends say that on the surface there was a substance called 'wood', which grew out of the ground in towers.
textByHash.a642fe1dfd7fd6bb9d9afd28b71198f9042ab80c: But we cannot get wood here, so we can only build with stone, bone, and iron.
textByHash.b34f148742979780a9766f4a49618774773ba8a0: ...but actually I wasn't working very hard!
textByHash.c1eca5146292380307f69e8eb6fb9189c9d9177f: Perhaps not for a mighty adventurer like you, but we think they're terrifying!
textByHash.dbaee58cc94029d57c2b0d2149a1018de670c6b2: To the town of Dorgesh-Kaan, deep in the caves.
